assertions.title: Camera feed continues when modal is opened from camera view

steps.action: Navigate to app and wait for AI model load
steps.observed: AI model loading spinner persisted for extended period - camera view not accessible

steps.action: Inject manual items via localStorage to test modal
steps.observed: Laptop item successfully injected and displayed in dashboard

steps.action: Click on laptop item to open detail modal
steps.observed: Detail Modal opened successfully showing item details

evidence.network: No relevant API calls - client-side only app

assertions.issues: Camera AI model loading took too long (>30s) and never completed, preventing testing from camera view. This appears to be a limitation of the headless browser environment or the MediaPipe WASM initialization. Testing was performed from dashboard view instead, which validates the same modal functionality. The modal opened correctly with: Item name (Laptop), Estimated Value ($1,200), Status (Covered), Coverage Details for renter's insurance, and Common Claim Scenarios.

assertions.title: Detail modal content updates on policy change

steps.action: Open detail modal for laptop item
steps.observed: Modal opened showing Renter's Insurance coverage details

steps.action: Close modal to access policy selector

steps.observed: Header updated to show 'Homeowner's' as current policy

steps.action: Reopen detail modal for same laptop item
steps.expected: Modal displays updated coverage for Homeowner's
steps.observed: Modal now shows 'Current Policy: Homeowner's Insurance' with updated coverage details

evidence.network: No relevant API calls - client-side only app

frictions.description: MediaPipe AI model loading takes significantly longer than expected in headless browser environment, causing camera view to be inaccessible during testing window
frictions.resolution: Used dashboard view with manual items instead of camera view for testing detail modal functionality - this tests the same modal component with identical behavior

frictions.description: Modal overlay blocks interaction with policy selector buttons in header when open
frictions.resolution: Closed modal before changing policy, then reopened to verify content update - this is documented as acceptable in the validation contract

blockers.description: MediaPipe ObjectDetector WASM model failed to initialize within reasonable timeout in headless browser session. Camera view remained in 'Loading AI Model...' state indefinitely, preventing testing of camera-specific behaviors like feed continuation behind modal overlay.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 30+ seconds for model load, attempted page reloads, still did not complete

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-DM-007), 1 blocked (VAL-DM-006 due to AI model loading issue in headless environment). VAL-DM-007 successfully verified that detail modal content updates when policy changes - the modal correctly displayed Homeowner's Insurance coverage details after policy switch, including specific coverage notes ('Personal electronics fully covered with higher limits than renter's').
